questions: Does hlx org list work as a purely local-only operation without requiring auth or server calls?
Does the multi-token config correctly resolve the current org entry?
Does hlx token add validate with the server and store the org/token pair?
Does hlx org switch resolve from local entries for hxi_ tokens?
Does the env-var override path remain unchanged?
Are token values masked in output?

answers.answer: After code review fix: Yes. hlx org list now bypasses requireConfig() and calls cmdOrgList() directly, which reads only from getOrgEntries() and loadRawConfig(). No server call. Before the fix, the org command was gated behind requireConfig() which could fail if loadConfig() returned null.
evidence: src/index.ts: org case calls runOrg(args.slice(1)) without requireConfig()

answers.answer: Yes. loadConfig() (config.ts L39-85) reads the orgs array, finds the entry matching currentOrg, and returns it as HxConfig. Single-org convenience: if only one entry exists and no currentOrg, uses that entry.

Yes. cmdTokenAdd (token/add.ts) validates format (must start with hxi_), calls /api/auth/me with temp config, extracts organization.id and organization.name, stores via addOrgEntry. Invalid tokens cause error exit without writing config.

Yes. cmdOrgSwitch (switch.ts L17-61) for hxi_ tokens: resolves by exact orgId, then exact alias, then case-insensitive orgName. Ambiguous names list matches and exit. Unconfigured org lists configured orgs and exits. Calls setCurrentOrg on match.

Yes. loadConfig() (config.ts L41-45) checks HELIX_API_KEY/HELIX_INSPECT_TOKEN/HELIX_INSPECT_API_KEY and HELIX_URL/HELIX_INSPECT_BASE_URL/HELIX_INSPECT_URL first. Returns immediately with env-var values, completely bypassing multi-token config.
Yes. maskToken (config.ts L191-197) returns hxi_<first8>... for tokens longer than prefix+8. Used in token add output (add.ts L73) and error messages (add.ts L45).

statement: CLI reviewed. One issue found and fixed: hlx org list was incorrectly gated behind requireConfig() in index.ts, violating ticket Req #4 (local-only). Fix: moved requireConfig() into runOrg() per-subcommand so cmdOrgList() executes without auth. All other CLI changes correct: multi-token config, token add, org switch, env-var override, token masking. TypeScript and build pass after fix.
